auth.passportAuthDescription:
Forum ensures one person, one vote through passport verification.
Your data stays on your device using zero-knowledge proofs.
auth.couldNotReadPassport: Could not read passport. Please try again.
auth.enterPassportMrzManually: Enter your passport MRZ details manually.
auth.couldNotAccessNFC: Could not access NFC. Please ensure NFC is enabled and try again.
auth.couldNotNavigateToScanner: Could not navigate to scanner. Please try again.
auth.demoModeDescription: Test all features without a passport
auth.demoModeFullDescription: Access all app features without scanning a passport. No API requests will be sent - perfect for testing.
auth.demoModeError: Could not activate demo mode. Please try again.
auth.generateNewKeyDescription: Create a new random wallet for testing
auth.usePrivateKey: Or use your own private key
auth.invalidPrivateKey: Invalid private key. Please check and try again.

passport.stepOneOfTwo: Step 1 of 2: Read the Machine Readable Zone (Passport or ID Card)
passport.cameraPermissionMessage: This app needs camera access to scan passport MRZ
passport.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission is required to scan MRZ
passport.flatOnTopOfPassport: Flat on top of the passport
passport.closeToPassportChip: Close to the passport chip area
passport.placePhoneOnPassport: Place your phone on top of your passport
passport.keepPassportFlat: Keep the passport flat and steady
passport.waitForDetection: Wait for the NFC chip to be detected
passport.doNotMove: Do not move until reading is complete
passport.name: Name
passport.authenticationFailedMessage: The passport chip rejected the authentication. This usually happens when the MRZ data doesn't match the chip data.
passport.mutualAuthFailedMessage: Could not establish secure communication with the passport chip. The MRZ data might be incorrect.
passport.tagLostMessage: Lost connection with the passport. Please hold the phone steady on the passport.
passport.transceiveFailedMessage: Failed to communicate with the passport chip. Try cleaning the chip area and ensure good contact.
passport.checkMrzData: Double-check the MRZ data (document number, birth date, expiry date)
passport.ensureValidPassport: Ensure this is a valid biometric passport with NFC chip
passport.cleanChip: Clean the passport chip area (back cover)
passport.tryDifferentPosition: Try different phone positions on the passport
passport.noMrzDataReceived: No MRZ data received. Please scan your passport again.
passport.couldNotReadPassportNfc: Could not read passport via NFC. Please try again.
passport.cannotGoBack: Cannot go back. Please restart the app.
passport.nfcUnavailableSimulator: NFC reading is not available in iOS Simulator. Please test on a real device with NFC capability.
passport.nfcUnavailableIosVersion: NFC requires iOS 13 or later. Please update your device.
passport.nfcUnavailableDisabled: NFC reading is disabled. Please enable NFC in Settings > General > NFC.
passport.nfcUnavailableDevice: NFC is not available on this device. iPhone 7+ supports NFC. Please check device compatibility.
passport.simulatorTestingLine3: Use iPhone 7+ or iPad Pro for NFC testing

voting.mobileOnly: Voting is available on mobile devices only

feed.unableToRefresh: Unable to refresh feed. Pull down to retry.

profile.votingHistoryWillAppear: Your voting history will appear here
profile.shareMessage: Check out {{displayName}}'s profile on Forum - Join the democratic movement: {{profileUrl}}
profile.privacyInfo: Your data is stored locally on your device. Passport information is never sent to our servers. Zero-knowledge proofs ensure your identity remains private while participating in democratic processes.
profile.supportContact: For support, please contact us at support@forum.online
profile.avatarUploaded: Avatar uploaded. Save profile to apply it.
profile.avatarUploadInvalid: Select a valid image under 2 MB
profile.avatarPickerUnavailable: Avatar picker is unavailable in this app build. Update or reinstall the app.
profile.avatarUploadUnavailable: Avatar upload is not available right now

instructions.goodLighting: Ensure good lighting for best results
instructions.lookForMrz: Look for MRZ lines like these (passport example):

harmonyos.compatibilityMessage: OCR scanning may not work properly on HarmonyOS devices. The camera scanner might close unexpectedly due to native module compatibility issues. Please try manual entry instead.

biometric.description: Enable biometric authentication for quick and secure access

sidebar.verifyPassportPrompt: Verify with your passport to participate in governance

nfcStatus.disabledDescription: NFC is required to read your passport chip. Please enable it to continue.

passportAuth.title: Passport Authentication
passportAuth.description: Use your government-issued passport as your secure wallet key. No seed phrases to remember.

wallet.title: Built-in Ethereum Wallet
wallet.description: Send, receive, and manage your crypto assets with a wallet generated from your passport.

social.title: Social Democracy Platform
social.description: Join verified discussions, create polls, and vote on initiatives with guaranteed one-person-one-vote.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your passport data never leaves your device. We use zero-knowledge proofs for verification.

walletWeb.webNote: Web version - Full wallet features available on mobile
